text:
Anthony Ammirati has been offered a porn deal worth $250,000 after the French pole vaulter went viral at the 2024Olympic GamesinParis.

Ammirati sentsocial mediainto a frenzy with an infamous attempt at clearing 5.70 meters, withhis penis getting right in the wayto cost him a spot in the final.

The 21-year-old pole vaulting star now has the opportunity toturn that heartbreakinto cash, with pornographic website CamSoda making him a big financial offer.

CamSoda vice president Daryn Parker toldTMZ: ‘If it was up to me, I’d award [Anthony Ammirati] for what everyone else saw, [his] talent below the belt.

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for updates from the Paris 2024 Olympics

‘As a lover of crotch-centric activities, I’d love to offer you up to $250,000 in exchange for a 60-minute webcam show, in which you show off your goods, minus the crossbar, of course.’

Ammirati finished 12th in his group, unable to book a spot in the pole vault final, which would’ve given him a shot at landing an Olympic medal at his home Games.

‘It’s a big disappointment,’ the Frenchman said after his elimination. ‘I’m a bit gutted, because I didn’t miss anything on the third attempt at 5.70m.

‘What I did miss was a bit of jumping in training to fine-tune the settings. Just a technical session.

‘I had to give up the last two, because after a small grade one in the adductor, I prioritised the race. I was 100 per cent physically, but I was missing a bit…

‘The conditions were good. It’s the first time I’ve started a competition without any stress. As I was a total outsider, I only had one goal: to play with the public. I was almost there.’

Serena Williams’ former coach Rennae Stubbs has offered some advice for Ammirati and has urged him to ‘call a drag queen’ for his future events.

‘My man!’ Stubbs posted on X. ‘Call a drag queen! She’ll teach u how to tuck it! This is unbelievable!

Tucking is generally referred to as hiding the genitals between the legs and buttocks, to create a flat pelvic area.

title: Olympic pole vaulter offered $250,000 porn deal after going viral at Paris Games | Metro News
description: Anthony Ammirati has been offered a porn deal worth $250,000 after the French pole vaulter went viral at the 2024 Olympic Games in Paris.
